text: I feel a keen sense of curiosity being here. The environment has an air of discovery and learning, as if each corner might reveal a new idea or provoke a question. Surrounded by displays on research and development, I'm reminded of humanity's collective journey toward understanding. In the presence of another person, I also sense anticipation—are we here for the same reason, or seeking different answers? I am both observer and participant, part of a living dialogue with knowledge itself.
